items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Sherlock?
items.explanation: Sherlock Holmes is one of the defining characters in Sherlock.

items.q: The character Buffy Summers appears in Buffy the Vampire Slayer.
items.explanation: Buffy Summers is a key character in Buffy the Vampire Slayer.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Friends?
items.explanation: Rachel Green is one of the defining characters in Friends.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Stranger Things?
items.explanation: Eleven is one of the defining characters in Stranger Things.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Rick Grimes.
items.explanation: Rick Grimes is strongly linked to The Walking Dead.

items.q: Which tv show features the character Gregory House?
items.explanation: Gregory House is associated with House.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Jon Snow.
items.explanation: Jon Snow is strongly linked to Game of Thrones.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Fox Mulder.
items.explanation: Fox Mulder is strongly linked to The X-Files.

items.q: The character Walter White appears in Game of Thrones.
items.explanation: Walter White appears in Breaking Bad, not Game of Thrones.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Din Djarin.
items.explanation: Din Djarin is strongly linked to The Mandalorian.
